scripts.prisma:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.prisma:deploy: cd backend && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.prisma:setup: npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:deploy && npm run prisma:seed
scripts.setup: git submodule update --init --recursive && npm run env:setup && npm run install:all && npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:deploy && npm run prisma:seed
scripts.install:all: npm run install:frontend && npm run install:backend
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
